seo_title: Memorial Necklace for Loss of Daughter | Moon Raven Designs
meta_description: Handcrafted cremation jewelry for a daughter. Sterling silver and bronze pendants that hold ashes or memory. Made on Vancouver Island since 1974.
intro: The loss of a daughter is a wound that does not close. It is not a chapter that ends, but a presence that shifts. This page is for the parent who carries that absence in their chest and wants something tangible to hold against it. Not to fix, not to soften, but to accompany. A piece of jewelry that holds a small weight of what remains.
choosing: Choosing the right piece begins with how you want to carry her with you. A pendant rests near the heart, a ring is always at hand, an urn pendant holds a small portion of ashes securely. You may choose to include a tiny amount of ash, a lock of hair, or nothing at all — the piece can hold only memory. Consider the size: a smaller pendant is quieter, easier to wear daily; a larger one makes its presence known. Engraving options include names, dates, or a word that only you understand.
what_it_carries: What the piece holds is not just ash or hair. It holds the weight of her laugh, the curve of her cheek, the particular way she said your name. Wearing it is a private act — a touchstone you reach for when the world feels too loud or too empty. Some wear it every day, others only on hard anniversaries. It does not need to be seen to be felt. The metal warms against your skin and becomes part of you.
for_whom: These pieces are made for mothers and fathers who have lost a daughter at any age — whether she was an infant, a child, or an adult. They are for the parent who does not need to explain their grief to strangers, who wants something quiet and true. They are for the one who still reaches for her in the morning, who wants a small vessel for a love that has no place to go.
blessing: May this small weight against your skin be a reminder that she is not gone, only changed. May you carry her gently, and may she carry you.

faq.q: What is a good sympathy gift for the loss of a daughter?
faq.a: A memorial necklace that holds a small amount of ashes or a lock of hair is a deeply personal gift. It offers a tangible connection without demanding public display. Choose a piece that reflects her style or a shared memory.

faq.q: What do you say to a mother who lost her daughter?
faq.a: There are no perfect words. A simple 'I am so sorry' followed by an offer to listen or sit in silence is often enough. Avoid platitudes or trying to make it better. Your presence matters more than anything you say.
A cremation necklace is a pendant designed to hold a small portion of cremated remains. It typically has a secure screw-top or threaded opening and can be worn daily as a private keepsake.

faq.q: How much ash fits in a cremation pendant?
faq.a: Our pendants hold approximately 1/4 to 1/2 teaspoon of ash. This is a symbolic amount, not the full remains. You can also choose to hold a lock of hair, a small fabric swatch, or nothing at all.

faq.q: Is it safe to wear a cremation necklace every day?
faq.a: Yes. Our pendants are crafted with secure closures and durable materials like sterling silver and oxidized bronze. They are designed for daily wear, but we recommend removing them during swimming or heavy activity.

faq.q: Can I personalize a memorial necklace for my daughter?
faq.a: Yes. We offer engraving of names, dates, or short phrases. You can also choose from different pendant shapes and metals to reflect her personality or your connection.
